tasks.subject: Task 0: Schema Migration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `isHabit` to Task, create `HabitLog` model, add `habitLog` backlink to `TaskReflection`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `prisma/schema.prisma`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Task has isHabit Boolean @default(false) and habitLogs HabitLog[]
- HabitLog model with @@unique([taskId, date]) and onDelete: Cascade
- TaskReflection has habitLog HabitLog? backlink
- Migration runs without errors

**Verify:** `npx prisma validate` → valid

```json:metadata
{"files": ["prisma/schema.prisma"], "verifyCommand": "npx prisma validate", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Task has isHabit field", "HabitLog model created", "TaskReflection has habitLog backlink", "Migration succeeds"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Types and taskUtils
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add HabitLog type, extend Task with isHabit and createdAt, update TaskFilters/CreateTaskInput/buildTasksUrl.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/types/index.ts`
- Modify: `src/hooks/taskUtils.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Task type has isHabit: boolean and createdAt: string
- HabitLog type exported
- TaskFilters and CreateTaskInput have isHabit?: boolean
- buildTasksUrl({ isHabit: true }) returns URL with isHabit=true

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit` → no errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/types/index.ts", "src/hooks/taskUtils.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Task.isHabit: boolean", "Task.createdAt: string", "HabitLog type exported", "TaskFilters.isHabit added", "buildTasksUrl handles isHabit"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: GET /api/tasks — isHabit filter
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Support ?isHabit=true query param in GET /api/tasks.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/app/api/tasks/route.ts`
- Modify: `src/app/api/tasks/route.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- GET /api/tasks?isHabit=true returns only habit tasks
- Omitting param returns all tasks (unchanged)

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/app/api/tasks/route.test.ts` → all pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/api/tasks/route.ts", "src/app/api/tasks/route.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/app/api/tasks/route.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["isHabit=true filters where clause", "omitting param unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: PATCH /api/tasks/[id] — isHabit validation and habit log upsert
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Upsert HabitLog on habit done; validate isHabit:true requires recurrence (both explicit recurrence:null AND missing recurrence on a task with no recurrence in DB).

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/app/api/tasks/[id]/route.ts`
- Modify: `src/app/api/tasks/[id]/route.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- PATCH { isHabit: true, recurrence: null } → 400 (immediate, no DB call)
- PATCH { isHabit: true } on task with recurrence:null in DB → 400 (after findUnique)
- PATCH done:true on habit task upserts HabitLog in $transaction
- Non-habit recurring tasks unaffected
- Mock factory must be MERGED (not replaced) — keep tag.count; add habitLog.upsert and $transaction

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/app/api/tasks/[id]/route.test.ts` → all pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/api/tasks/[id]/route.ts", "src/app/api/tasks/[id]/route.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/app/api/tasks/[id]/route.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["400 for isHabit+recurrence:null", "400 for isHabit on no-recurrence task", "HabitLog upserted in transaction", "non-habit recurring unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: POST /api/tasks — isHabit validation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Accept isHabit in task creation; 400 if isHabit:true without recurrence.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/app/api/tasks/route.ts`
- Modify: `src/app/api/tasks/route.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- POST { isHabit: true } (no recurrence) → 400
- POST { isHabit: true, recurrence: 'daily' } → 200 with isHabit: true

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/app/api/tasks/route.test.ts` → all pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/api/tasks/route.ts", "src/app/api/tasks/route.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/app/api/tasks/route.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["400 for isHabit without recurrence", "habit task created with isHabit:true"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: POST /api/tasks/[id]/reflection — habit log linkage
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Link most-recent HabitLog to new reflection for habit tasks; skip nextStepTitle for habits.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/app/api/tasks/[id]/reflection/route.ts`
- Modify: `src/app/api/tasks/[id]/reflection/route.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Habit reflection links HabitLog.reflectionId
- nextStepTitle ignored for habits
- Non-habit reflection still creates next-step tasks

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/app/api/tasks/[id]/reflection/route.test.ts` → all pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/api/tasks/[id]/reflection/route.ts", "src/app/api/tasks/[id]/reflection/route.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/app/api/tasks/[id]/reflection/route.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["HabitLog linked to reflection", "nextStepTitle ignored for habits", "non-habit unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: GET /api/tasks/[id]/habit-logs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New endpoint returning last 90 days of HabitLog records with mood/difficulty.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/app/api/tasks/[id]/habit-logs/route.ts`
- Create: `src/app/api/tasks/[id]/habit-logs/route.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 401 when unauthenticated
- 403 when task not owned by user
- Returns { logs: [...] } with reflection data

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/app/api/tasks/[id]/habit-logs/route.test.ts` → all pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/api/tasks/[id]/habit-logs/route.ts", "src/app/api/tasks/[id]/habit-logs/route.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/app/api/tasks/[id]/habit-logs/route.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["401 unauthenticated", "403 wrong user", "returns logs with reflection"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: computeHabitStats
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure function: streak (daily), completionRate (daily/weekly/monthly with createdAt cap), moodTrend.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/hooks/habitStats.ts`
- Create: `src/hooks/habitStats.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Daily streak counts consecutive UTC days ending today/yesterday
- Completion rate denominator capped by createdAt
- Mood trend is last 10 logs with non-null mood, chronological

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/hooks/habitStats.test.ts` → all pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/hooks/habitStats.ts", "src/hooks/habitStats.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/hooks/habitStats.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["streak counts consecutive days", "missing day resets streak", "completionRate capped by createdAt", "moodTrend last 10"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: useHabits and useHabitLogs hooks
tasks.description:
**Goal:** TanStack Query hooks for habits list and per-habit log history.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/hooks/useHabits.ts`
- Create: `src/hooks/useHabitLogs.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- useHabits queries ['tasks', { isHabit: true }]
- useHabitLogs(taskId) queries ['habitLogs', taskId]

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit` → no errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/hooks/useHabits.ts", "src/hooks/useHabitLogs.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["useHabits returns Task[]", "useHabitLogs returns HabitLog[]"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: AddTaskForm — isHabit toggle
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Show isHabit toggle only when recurrence selected; auto-reset on recurrence clear.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/components/tasks/AddTaskForm.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Toggle hidden without recurrence
- Clearing recurrence resets isHabit to false
- isHabit:true passed in submit payload

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit` → no errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/tasks/AddTaskForm.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["toggle visible only with recurrence", "clearing recurrence hides toggle", "isHabit in submit payload"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: ReflectionModal — isHabit prop
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add optional isHabit prop; hide next-step field when true.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/components/tasks/ReflectionModal.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- isHabit prop accepted (optional, default false)
- Next-step input hidden when isHabit=true
- Non-habit behaviour unchanged

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit` → no errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/tasks/ReflectionModal.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["isHabit prop accepted", "next-step hidden for habits"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: HabitSection component
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Collapsible section with checkbox, 7-day heatmap, streak badge, Details link.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/components/habits/HabitSection.tsx`
- Create: `src/components/habits/HabitSection.test.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Renders null for empty habits
- Shows Привычки header with count badge
- Checkbox calls onToggle + onRequestReflection
- 7-day heatmap colored by log presence
- Streak badge for daily habits only

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/components/habits/HabitSection.test.tsx` → all pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/habits/HabitSection.tsx", "src/components/habits/HabitSection.test.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/components/habits/HabitSection.test.tsx", "acceptanceCriteria": ["null for empty list", "header with count", "checkbox fires onToggle+onRequestReflection", "7-day heatmap", "streak badge daily only"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: TaskList — integrate HabitSection
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Render HabitSection above sortable list; exclude habits from sortable list AND from SortableContext items; pass isHabit to ReflectionModal.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/components/tasks/TaskList.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- HabitSection rendered at top
- Habit tasks not in sortable list
- SortableContext items prop updated to exclude habit IDs: `tasks.filter(t => !t.isHabit).map(t => t.id)`
- ReflectionModal receives isHabit from task lookup

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit` → no errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/tasks/TaskList.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["HabitSection at top", "habits excluded from sortable list", "SortableContext items excludes habits", "ReflectionModal gets isHabit"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 13: HabitCard, /habits page, and BurgerMenu link
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Full stat card for /habits page; page listing all habits; BurgerMenu navigation link.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/components/habits/HabitCard.tsx`
- Create: `src/app/habits/page.tsx`
- Modify: `src/components/BurgerMenu.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- HabitCard: 30-day heatmap, streak/rate, mood trend
- Logs fetched lazily (only when card expanded)
- /habits page lists all habits via useHabits
- BurgerMenu Привычки link → /habits

**Verify:** `npx vitest run` → all tests pass (existing + new)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/habits/HabitCard.tsx", "src/app/habits/page.tsx", "src/components/BurgerMenu.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run", "acceptanceCriteria": ["HabitCard with 30-day heatmap", "lazy log fetch on expand", "/habits page", "BurgerMenu link"]}
```
